ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the software package */,
  "package_version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "update_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the update (e.g., GA Release, Beta) */,
  "released_date" TEXT /* Date the package was released */,
  "package_hub_version" TEXT /* Version of the package hub */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the package */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the package */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Change log for the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., AArch64, x86-64) */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the platform */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system supported by the platform */,
  "supported_since" TEXT /* Date since the platform is supported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subpackages" (
  "subpackage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subpackage */,
  "subpackage_name" TEXT /* Name of the subpackage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subpackage */,
  "subpackage_version" TEXT /* Version of the subpackage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subpackage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_platforms" (
  "package_platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package-platform mapping */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "supported_since" TEXT /* Date since the package is supported on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_platforms_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_platforms_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_subpackages" (
  "package_subpackage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package-subpackage mapping */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "subpackage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subpackage */,
  "included_since" TEXT /* Date since the subpackage is included in the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_subpackage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_subpackages_subpackage_id FOREIGN KEY ("subpackage_id") REFERENCES subpackages ("subpackage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_subpackages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA, admin) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the package */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity changed (e.g., package, platform, subpackage) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., package update, new platform) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message sent in the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., CI/CD, issue tracking) */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "integration_url" TEXT /* URL of the integration */,
  "integration_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether the integration is enabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
